final_prompt.prompt:
Create a horizontal banner news photography image for a Weibo hot topic post.

Style/medium: must be professional documentary/photojournalism aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide banner format with horizontal extension, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion, distant high-rise buildings reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must be urban cityscape at dusk transitioning to night, neon lights beginning to illuminate, dramatic light and shadow contrast, strong sense of real on-site presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic dusk atmosphere with theatrical light-shadow contrast — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a sunset-to-neon transition direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs 8K-quality sharp detail texture — exact grain and sharpness level is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold/modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower-right)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, professional high-end finish, real Weibo viral post aesthetic
Avoid:
